privileged_info_summary: The task expects 8 ProximityLink edges between restaurants and attractions, all matching on shared city. The expected pairs are: Da Enzo al 29 ↔ Colosseum (Rome), Lorenz Adlon Esszimmer ↔ Brandenburg Gate (Berlin), Le Cinq ↔ Eiffel Tower (Paris), Sketch ↔ Big Ben (London), Per Se ↔ Statue of Liberty (New York), Spondi ↔ Acropolis of Athens (Athens), Spondi ↔ Parthenon (Athens), Tickets ↔ Sagrada Familia (Barcelona). The MatchBasis property is uniformly 'same_city', and the BatchId is 'geo_proximity_2026q1'. Data is synthetic, seeded into OrientDB demodb during task setup via INSERT statements in setup_task.sh.
